unlockPuzzles.puzzle: I am the art of making, combining elements anew. What am I?
I have a head and a handle that fits, to chop and split I'm hard to beat. What am I?
I protect you from the elements, a haven from the storm. What am I?
People gather, buildings rise, a community takes shape before your eyes. What is this place?
Larger than a hamlet, smaller than a town, with trades and crafts of growing renown. What am I?
Markets bustle, laws are made, culture flourishes in every trade. What have we become?
Science, art, and industry combine, pushing humanity past every confine. What is this grand achievement?

events.name: Bountiful Harvest
events.description: An unexpectedly good harvest provides extra food.

events.name: Stone Discovery
events.description: A new stone deposit is found nearby.

events.name: Wandering Herbalist
events.description: A traveling herbalist shares some knowledge.

events.name: Heavy Rain
events.description: Heavy rain makes gathering more difficult but provides extra water.

events.name: Tool Breakthrough
events.description: Your people develop better tools, improving gathering efficiency.

milestoneEvents.title: Refugees Spotted
milestoneEvents.description: A group of survivors has been spotted approaching your settlement. They look hungry and tired.

milestoneEvents.title: Ancient Supply Cache
milestoneEvents.description: Your workers discovered a pre-war supply cache while digging. How should we handle it?

milestoneEvents.title: Merchant Caravan
milestoneEvents.description: A caravan of traders arrives offering goods. They're willing to trade if you can spare resources.

milestoneEvents.title: Disease Outbreak
milestoneEvents.description: A mysterious illness is spreading through your settlement. Quick action is needed!

milestoneEvents.title: Territorial Dispute
milestoneEvents.description: Neighboring survivors claim the nearby quarry belongs to them. How do you respond?

milestoneEvents.title: A Golden Age Begins
milestoneEvents.description: Your civilization has reached a point of unprecedented prosperity. How will you celebrate?

items.name: Knife
items.description: A basic tool for various tasks
items.puzzle: I'm sharp and handy, cut and slice, in survival I'm worth my price.

items.name: Axe
items.description: Improves wood gathering efficiency
items.puzzle: What has a handle and a head, but no arms or legs?

items.name: Shelter
items.description: Reduces resource consumption
items.puzzle: I keep you safe, I keep you dry, I'm built with care, up toward the sky. What am I?

items.name: Fishing Rod
items.description: Allows fishing, providing a new food source
items.puzzle: I'm long and thin, with a hook at the end, I help you catch dinner, I'm your aquatic friend.

items.name: Pickaxe
items.description: Allows efficient stone and ore gathering
items.puzzle: I have a point and a rocky mission, breaking through stone is my ambition.

items.name: Farm
items.description: Produces food over time
items.puzzle: With seeds and soil, sun and rain, I help your food to grow again. What am I?

items.name: Well
items.description: Produces water over time
items.puzzle: Deep in the earth, I'm built with care, to bring up something vital and rare. What am I?

items.name: Kiln
items.description: Allows creation of bricks and pottery
items.puzzle: I'm hot inside, turning soft to hard, with me you can shape clay, I'm a crafter's card.

items.name: Loom
items.description: Allows creation of cloth for advanced crafting
items.puzzle: Threads intertwine, as I work back and forth, creating fabric fine, I prove my worth.

items.name: Herbalist's Hut
items.description: Produces medicine, improving population health
items.puzzle: Leaves and roots, I know their use, to heal the sick, my knowledge I produce.

items.name: Watchtower
items.description: Improves resource discovery rate
items.puzzle: I stand tall and see far, guarding day and night, from my peak, everything's in sight.

items.name: Storehouse
items.description: Increases resource storage capacity
items.puzzle: Walls and roof, I keep things dry, your goods within, safe and spry.

items.name: Tannery
items.description: Allows creation of leather for advanced crafting
items.puzzle: Hides I treat, with skill and care, turning skin to leather, strong and fair.

items.name: Forge
items.description: Allows metal working for advanced tools
items.puzzle: Fire burns hot, metal bends to will, I shape the future, with hammer and skill.

items.name: Orchard
items.description: Produces fruit over time
items.puzzle: Trees in rows, bearing sweet delight, I grow your food, from dawn to night.

items.name: Library
items.description: Increases knowledge generation
items.puzzle: Words on pages, knowledge stored, in my halls, wisdom is explored.

items.name: Pottery Workshop
items.description: Creates pottery for water storage and trading
items.puzzle: With wheel and hand, I shape the clay, creating vessels for use each day.

items.name: Hunting Lodge
items.description: Improves food gathering from animals
items.puzzle: In forest deep, I track and stalk, to bring back meat, on which we'll not balk.

items.name: Quarry
items.description: Increases stone and ore production
items.puzzle: I dig deep into the mountain's heart, to bring forth riches, stone and ore to impart.

items.name: Weaving Mill
items.description: Produces cloth more efficiently
items.puzzle: Shuttles fly, threads entwine, creating fabric, line by line.

items.name: Sawmill
items.description: Dramatically increases wood production
items.puzzle: Blades whir and timber falls, transforming trees to planks for walls.

items.name: Marketplace
items.description: Allows trading and increases resource exchange efficiency
items.puzzle: Goods are bought and sold with glee, in this place of commerce and trade you'll see.

items.name: Windmill
items.description: Improves food production and introduces flour making
items.puzzle: My arms reach high, catching the breeze, grinding the grain with the greatest of ease.

items.name: Apothecary
items.description: Creates advanced medicines and increases population health
items.puzzle: Potions and tinctures, I brew with care, to cure the sick and health repair.

items.name: School
items.description: Increases knowledge generation and population skill
items.puzzle: Young minds gather, to learn and grow, in this place of learning, knowledge to sow.

items.name: Brewery
items.description: Produces beverages that boost worker morale and productivity
items.puzzle: Bubbling vats and aging casks, I create drinks for all tasks.

items.name: Glassworks
items.description: Produces glass for advanced construction and tools
items.puzzle: From sand to liquid, then cooled with care, I create clear panes beyond compare.

items.name: Blacksmith
items.description: Crafts metal tools and weapons, improving various gathering and crafting activities
items.puzzle: With hammer and anvil, I shape the ore, creating tools not seen before.

items.name: Granary
items.description: Increases food storage capacity and reduces spoilage
items.puzzle: Tall and round, I stand with pride, keeping the harvest safe inside.

items.name: Irrigation System
items.description: Improves farm yields and water efficiency
items.puzzle: Channels and pipes, I guide the flow, helping crops to thrive and grow.

items.name: Textile Mill
items.description: Mass-produces textiles for clothing and trade
items.puzzle: Spinning wheels and clattering looms, I weave fine cloth in many rooms.

items.name: Paper Mill
items.description: Produces paper for books and administration
items.puzzle: Pulp and press, sheets so fine, on me your words will soon align.

items.name: Music Hall
items.description: Enhances culture and provides entertainment
items.puzzle: Melodies and harmonies resound, bringing joy to all around.

items.name: Observatory
items.description: Greatly enhances knowledge generation and unlocks advanced technologies
items.puzzle: Gazing at stars, secrets unfold, in this tower of science, discoveries bold.

items.name: Shipyard
items.description: Builds ships for fishing and trade, opening up new opportunities
items.puzzle: By river or sea, my creations sail free, bringing wealth from lands across the sea.

items.name: Scriptorium
items.description: Produces books, increasing knowledge generation and preservation
items.puzzle: Quills scratch and pages turn, preserving knowledge for all to learn.

items.name: Alchemist's Laboratory
items.description: Conducts experiments, unlocking new resources and technologies
items.puzzle: Bubbling flasks and smoky air, I seek truths both dark and fair.

items.name: Monument
items.description: Increases population happiness and attracts new settlers
items.puzzle: Towering high for all to see, I mark achievements of our society.

items.name: Theater
items.description: Increases population happiness and cultural development
items.puzzle: On my stage, stories unfold, entertaining young and old.

items.name: Lighthouse
items.description: Improves fishing and trade ship safety
items.puzzle: Tall I stand by waters deep, guiding ships while others sleep.

items.name: University
items.description: Greatly accelerates research and unlocks advanced technologies
items.puzzle: Halls of learning, minds alight, I push the boundaries of wrong and right.

items.name: Mint
items.description: Produces currency, enabling advanced economic systems
items.puzzle: Metal discs I stamp with care, creating wealth beyond compare.

items.name: Aqueduct
items.description: Improves water distribution and hygiene
items.puzzle: Arches high, water flows, bringing life where'er it goes.

items.name: Telescope
items.description: Enhances astronomical research and navigation
items.puzzle: Through me gaze at stars so far, unlocking secrets of what they are.

items.name: Printing Press
items.description: Mass-produces books, greatly accelerating knowledge spread
items.puzzle: Letters arranged in lines so neat, I make copies quick and fleet.

items.name: Bank
items.description: Manages currency and enables loans
items.puzzle: Gold and silver, notes and coins, I guard them well in secure loins.

items.name: Courthouse
items.description: Improves law and order, reducing crime
items.puzzle: Justice served with balanced scales, here the law never fails.

items.name: Factory
items.description: Enables mass production of goods
items.puzzle: Wheels turn and belts convey, producing goods day by day.

items.name: Hospital
items.description: Greatly improves population health and lifespan
items.puzzle: In my wards, the sick find care, healing hands and knowledge rare.

items.name: Railway
items.description: Improves transportation and resource distribution
items.puzzle: On iron rails I swiftly glide, carrying goods from side to side.

items.name: Power Plant
items.description: Generates energy for advanced buildings and technologies
items.puzzle: Turbines spin with mighty force, providing power from nature's source.

items.name: Stock Exchange
items.description: Enables advanced economic transactions and investments
items.puzzle: Bulls and bears, they come and go, as numbers rise and fall in show.

items.name: Assembly Line
items.description: Dramatically increases production efficiency
items.puzzle: Step by step, piece by piece, production speed I will increase.

items.name: Research Laboratory
items.description: Conducts advanced scientific research
items.puzzle: In test tubes and under microscope, I seek answers and foster hope.

items.name: Metropolis
items.description: A grand city that provides numerous benefits
items.puzzle: Towers high and streets so wide, a bustling hub where millions reside.

items.name: Space Program
items.description: Enables space exploration and advanced scientific discoveries
items.puzzle: Beyond the sky, to stars we fly, in metal birds that pierce the sky.

explorationLocations.name: Abandoned Bunker
explorationLocations.description: A pre-war military bunker partially buried in rubble
explorationLocations.lore: Inside you find preserved rations and a faded journal detailing the last days before the fall.

explorationLocations.name: Ruined Library
explorationLocations.description: The remains of a once-great library, its shelves mostly collapsed
explorationLocations.lore: Among the damaged books, you find several intact volumes on engineering and agriculture.

explorationLocations.name: Old Mine Shaft
explorationLocations.description: A partially collapsed mine shaft that might still hold valuable minerals
explorationLocations.lore: The mine still has rich veins of ore. Your people can harvest them carefully.

explorationLocations.name: Overgrown Farm
explorationLocations.description: A farm that nature has reclaimed, but some crops might still be salvageable
explorationLocations.lore: Wild variants of pre-war crops have adapted and flourished here.

explorationLocations.name: Riverside Camp
explorationLocations.description: Remains of a riverside survivor camp with useful supplies
explorationLocations.lore: The camp was well-organized. You find fishing nets and water purification notes.

explorationLocations.name: Radio Tower
explorationLocations.description: A tall communication tower that might still have working equipment
explorationLocations.lore: The tower's logs reveal there may be other settlements out there, broadcasting on old frequencies.

explorationLocations.name: Sunken Warehouse
explorationLocations.description: A partially flooded warehouse in the old commercial district
explorationLocations.lore: Construction materials aplenty. This warehouse served a now-forgotten building company.

explorationLocations.name: Hidden Laboratory
explorationLocations.lore: Advanced research notes on genetics and medicine. This could accelerate your civilization's progress dramatically.

quests.name: Shelter Builder
quests.description: Build a shelter for your people

quests.name: Food Security
quests.description: Build a farm to secure food supply

quests.name: Water Works
quests.description: Build a well for reliable water

quests.name: First Trade
quests.description: Complete a trade with a merchant

factions.name: Riverside Commune
factions.description: A peaceful farming community by the river

factions.name: Iron Brotherhood
factions.description: A militaristic group skilled in metalwork

factions.name: Scholar's Guild
factions.description: Keepers of pre-war knowledge and technology

factions.name: Merchant League
factions.description: A confederation of traders and merchants

factions.name: Wasteland Raiders
factions.description: Dangerous nomads who take what they want
